summary: The source caps batchSize at 9 and the group count at 30, so the residual remainder-count state space is finite and too constrained for honest asymptotic timing tiers.

workload_bound.source_constraint: groups contains from 1 through 30 entries and batchSize is at most 9

replacement_checks.evidence: After zero and complementary reductions, memoization visits each bounded remainder-count tuple once and tries at most eight next remainders.
Regression compares the count-state solution with an independent index-bitmask oracle over exhaustive small remainder arrays and checks batch and group-count boundaries.
